case_title: JAIME GONZALEZ VS. CONTESSA C. OSBORNE et al

MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-21-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CONTESSA OSBORNE'S MOTION FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS OR CONSOLIDATION IN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION IS DENIED. THERE IS NO REASONABLE EVIDENCE PRESENTED JUSTIFYING IT UNDER THE LAW. THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER CASE WITH THE GENERAL CIVIL CASE IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
